title: Add Voice Messages
description: Extend the live chat with voice message support including recording, playback, and waveform visualization.
instructions:
Add voice message capabilities to your chat app:

1. Voice recording:
   - Record button in input area (hold to record, release to send)
   - Show recording duration while holding
   - Cancel recording if user slides finger left

2. Audio playback:
   - Inline audio player in chat bubbles
   - Play/pause button with progress indicator
   - Waveform visualization of audio
   - Support for multiple concurrent recordings/playback states

3. Upload and storage:
   - Compress audio before upload (OPUS or AAC format)
   - Upload to server and store URL in message
   - Cache played audio locally

4. UI polish:
   - Animate the record button when recording
   - Show playback progress on waveform
   - Handle errors gracefully (failed upload, playback errors)

Use the record and just_audio packages.

hints.text: Use GestureDetector with onLongPressStart and onLongPressEnd for the record button.
For waveform visualization, you can use a simplified bar chart showing amplitude over time.
Use AudioPlayer.setUrl() for streaming playback and manage the player state carefully to avoid conflicts.
